project_info.name: M & J Auto Services
project_info.address: 1037 S Claremont St, San Mateo, CA 94402

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing (p-8, p-12), modern asymmetric grids

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all icons (Wrench, Star, MapPin, Phone, Clock, ChevronRight, CheckCircle).

animations.global_instructions: Ensure `framer-motion` is installed. Disable complex animations via `prefers-reduced-motion`.

specific_effects.loader: Full screen `#3E2723` background with a spinning bronze wrench icon (`#B87333`) lasting ~1.5s before revealing the site.
specific_effects.hero_headline: Animated entrance with subtle parallax effect on scroll.
specific_effects.scroll_fades: Smooth scroll fades and slides (upwards) for content blocks (About, Services, Reviews).
specific_effects.service_cards: Subtle 3D tilt effect on hover or simple scale up (`scale-105`) with border glow.
specific_effects.counters: Scroll-triggered counters for the '7' Google Reviews and '5.0' Rating.

hero_background.description: White car with hood open in a professional auto repair shop.

about_image.description: Professional mechanic holding wrenches in hands.

services_detail.description: Detailed view of a shiny chrome car engine.

general_mechanic.description: Mechanic using a wrench on a car engine.

content_structure.details: Full screen intro. Background `#3E2723`. Center: Spinning Wrench icon (`text-[#B87333]`). Exits gracefully after 1.5s.
Sticky header with crystal glass effect (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF7F2]/80`). Logo text 'M & J Auto Services' in dark brown. Links: About, Services, Reviews, Contact. CTA: 'Get Quote' in bronze.

Background: `hero_background` image with a rich `bg-[#3E2723]/60` gradient overlay. Foreground: Massive Montserrat headline (e.g. 'Trust Your Vehicle to San Mateo’s Finest'). Animated 5-star badge. Live Open/Closed status badge. CTAs: 'Call Now' (Bronze button) and 'Get Quote' (Outline white button).

Bento-style layout or split 50/50. Left: `about_image` with rounded corners and subtle shadow. Right: Warm, welcoming copy. Emphasize 'Neighborhood mechanic meets premium craftsmanship'. Highlight the 5.0 rating on Google prominently here.

10 specific services: Engine Diagnostics, Oil Changes, AC Service, Brakes, Tires, Transmission, Battery, Check Engine, Tune-Ups, Pre-Purchase Inspection. Use clean white cards (`bg-[#FFFFFF]`), border `#795548/20`, icon for each, hover tilt effect.

High-impact section. Darker background (`#3E2723`) or rich metallic text over a light background. Features: 5-Star Rating, Honest Pricing, Experienced Techs, Customer-First, Transparent Estimates. Scroll-triggered counter for 7 reviews.
Showcase real-feeling customer reviews. Clean cards with 5 gold stars. Use framer-motion drag or standard flex overflow.

Split view. Left: Contact form (Name, Email, Phone, Vehicle Make/Model/Year, Service Needed, Message). Right: Details. Clickable phone, Hours table (highlight current day), 'Open Now' badge, 'Get Directions' button. Embedded Google Maps iframe for 1037 S Claremont St, San Mateo, CA 94402.
Background `#3E2723`, text `#FAF7F2`. Logo, copyright, short link list, exact address, and hours.

accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='nav-about'`, `data-testid='call-now-button'`).
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Do not put `#795548` text on `#3E2723` backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.fonts_installation: Load Montserrat and Open Sans from Google Fonts via next/font or standard HTML link tags.
